title: Tcard_X6873-16.2.0.135SP15-OP006PF001AZ_a15
description:
It is recommended to perform OTA upgrade when the battery is over 50%.

Update Version:
X6873-16.2.0.135SP15(OP006PF001AZ)

Update Content:
Android Version
Upgraded from Android 15 to Android 16 for enhanced security, more features, and a better user experience.

OS Version
Upgraded from XOS 15.1.2 to XOS 16.2.0 for a smarter user interface that gives your device a new look.

Security
Updated Google Security Patch to April 1, 2026.

AI
Upgraded AI Suggestions with more system service cards, enhanced noise cancellation for more calling scenarios, added AI Class Timetable, and optimized AI Notes, AI Writing, Dynamic Bar, and AI Search.

New Design
1. Added the Depth-Effect Homescreen feature that lets you enable a depth effect with uploaded portrait wallpapers or built-in wallpapers, giving the home screen a more layered look.
2. Supported setting live photos as live wallpapers to bring vivid moments back to life.
3. Supported generating a theme that matches the style or colors of an uploaded static wallpaper.

Multi-Device Connection
Fully upgraded Joy Connect, enabling services to flow seamlessly across multiple devices.

Security & Privacy
1. Supported finding phones remotely even when they are offline.
2. Optimized Unlock Security Protection, Privacy Password, and Dual System.

Communication
Enhanced communication in weak signal environments and optimized power consumption for hotspot sharing.

Performance
Added faster system animations to significantly improve app launch speed, and optimized responsive scheduling and MemFusion efficiency.

More
1. Fully upgraded cloud services with support for more data types and features.
2. Added Esports Mode in XArena for greater spatial immersion in games.
3. Added AI Voice Prompt, Smart Trigger, and Voice Broadcast in Game Assistant Panel.
4. Optimized All-Scenario Bypass Charging, supporting gaming, live streaming, navigation, and more scenarios.

Camera
Upgraded the camera interface for a refreshed user experience.

Folax
1. Fully upgraded Folax to deliver a smarter and richer AI experience.
2. Redesigned the client interface, delivering a cleaner layout, smoother operation, and an upgraded overall user experience.
3. Added support for more languages for smoother communication.
4. Features may vary by OS version and device model.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
